name: Preeti Patty
content: Literally a hole in the wall where you order your food. But hot damn is it some good food. I would recommend paying them a visit. The whole area of Hackney Wick is pretty nice, if you are a street art fan. I wish I could explore the area more. Some kid tried selling me weed while I was waiting on my food, but it was in some London dialect that I could not understand. After three increasingly exasperated attempts to explain what he was selling, his friend chimed in with a “would you like to buy some weed bruv,” and the confusion was resolved. Like any good businessman, he offered me a business card in the form of a slip of paper with his number on it. Polite and professional. I hope he is doing well.
